valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Sun 24 May 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Mon 25 May 2026
general_synopsis: High Humber 1033 expected netherlands 1033 by midday tomorrow. High Irish Sea 1032 dissipating by same time. Low Iberia 1019 losing its identity by that time
